data.title: GREEN: Implement sentinel self-detection fallback in shim
data.description:
## Description

Add a third fallback step to .claude/scripts/dso between the config resolution (current step 2, line 34) and the error message (current step 3, line 47). When $REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists and DSO_ROOT is still empty, set DSO_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso".

### Implementation details:
- Insert after line 34 (end of config block) and before line 36 (CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT export block):
  ```sh
  # (3) Self-detect: REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso with sentinel validation
  if [ -z "$DSO_ROOT" ] && [ -n "$REPO_ROOT" ] && [ -f "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" ]; then
      DSO_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso"
  fi
  ```
- The existing CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT export block (lines 36-44) already handles exporting when CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT was NOT already set, so no changes needed there — the sentinel-resolved DSO_ROOT will be exported via the existing logic.
- Update the DSO_ROOT resolution order comment at the top of the file to document step 3.
- Remove the .test-index RED markers added in the predecessor task.

### Intentional behavior note:
Exporting CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT from the sentinel path is intentional and consistent with how steps 1 and 2 export it. No downstream script uses absence of CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT as a configuration-detection signal — discover-agents.sh (line 29) depends on it being set.

### File Impact
- .claude/scripts/dso (modify: add sentinel check step 3)
- .test-index (modify: remove RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Shim contains sentinel check for .claude-plugin/plugin.json
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json' .claude/scripts/dso
- [ ] .test-index RED markers for sentinel tests are removed
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_shim_self_detects_via_sentinel\]' .test-index
- [ ] All sentinel tests pass when run directly
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'test_shim_self_detects_via_sentinel|test_shim_sentinel_requires|test_shim_sentinel_exports|test_discover_agents_resolves' | grep -v FAIL
- [ ] DSO_ROOT resolution order comment updated to document step 3
  Verify: grep -q 'sentinel\|self-detect' .claude/scripts/dso
